---
title: "FAQ"
---

## Where can I get help? 


### Office hours and appointments

The best place to come for help is my office hours! I can help with anything related to the course. You can stop by at any point during my MWF office hours, and you can reserve time on [my calendar](https://calendar.app.google/1mCMAVFgsKNhXsaV6) for a one-on-one appointment during my Tuesday office hours if you'd like to discuss anything more privately. 

### Stats Lab

Students needing help with their Statistics coursework and R/Rstudio questions can get help from Stats Lab Assistants in the Stats Lab in CMC 304.
